title: Non-Functional Requirement frontmatter schema
description: Schema for NFR artifacts — quality attributes the system must meet (performance, security, scalability, etc.). Reverse links (implemented_by, verified_by) are computed by the traceability script.

quality_attribute.description: Quality attribute category this NFR addresses

parent_epic.description: Wiki link to the parent Epic

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ, BR, or CTRL artifacts this requirement is derived from

depends_on.description: Wiki links to other FR/NFR this requirement depends on

measurement_method.description: How compliance with this NFR is measured
